title: Elon Musk says xAI must be 'rebuilt' as co-founder exodus continues, SpaceX IPO awaits
summary_full: With xAI now in the hands of SpaceX, Elon Musk says he's rebuilding the artificial intelligence company following high-level departures.
summary_public: With xAI now in the hands of SpaceX, Elon Musk says he's rebuilding the artificial intelligence company following high-level departures.
